description: Format the Master Service Agreement located at ~/Documents/TextDocuments/raw_msa_draft.docx in ONLYOFFICE Document Editor. Center align the title 'MASTER SERVICE AGREEMENT'. Apply 'Heading 1' style to the seven main numbered article headers and 'Heading 2' style to the seven sub-section headers. Justify align all standard body paragraphs. Bold the terms 'Confidential Information', 'Deliverables', and 'Effective Date' throughout the text. Save the final document as ~/Documents/TextDocuments/formatted_msa_final.docx.
